titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 59: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 59. (A.R. No. 219 of 1926.) KĪḺAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAIYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall, central shrine, Paśupatīśvara temple.

This inscription records a gift of 15 kaḻañju of gold by Maḻavar Koṅkaṇi Senni Nambiyār, the uncle of the Paḻuvēṭṭaraiyar Maṟavaṉ Kaṇḍaṉār for burning a perpetual lamp to the god of Maṟavanīśva-gṛiham at Śiṟupaḻuvūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṉṟak-kūṟṟam. Receiving that amount from Chaṇḍēśvara piḍārar, (the Secretary of God Śiva of that temple) Sāvandi Māṟaṉ Māṟan of Śiṟupaḻuvūr sold (his) 2(1/2) mā of land inclusive of a well in it to the temple. It was also enjoined that the lamp would be burnt with an uḻakku of ghee daily out of the proceeds of the land.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 237.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam
ciṟupaḻuvūr maṟavaniśvaragrihattu mahādevarkku Aṭikaḷ paḻuveṭṭaraiyar maṟavaṉ kaṇṭanār māma
ṭikaḷ maḻavar koṅkaṇi cenni nampiyār vaitta viḷakku Oṉṟukku Itanukku nilamāvatu ciṟupaḻuvūrc
cāvā(n)n=ti māṟaṉ māṟaṉeṉ maṟavaniśvarattu caṇḍeśvara piṭārarkku viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilañ ceṅkakuḷattiṉ tūm
piṉ kiḻ kiḻkkaḻaṉip peruvāykkāliṉ vaṭavāykkāl nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku
kiḻpāṟkkellai toḻurp pālāśrīyan bhaṭṭan nakkan nārāyaṇanum tampimār nilattukkum ciṟu
paḻuvurc cāvā(na)n=ti bhaṭṭan Iravimahāyeśvaranum Aṉubhavikkinṟa nilattukku meṟkkum tenpāṟkkellai peruvāykkālukku
vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai terpoku Oḻukkaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Ēḻumā vāykkālukkut teṟkkum Ivvicai
tta perunānkellaiyilk kiṇaṟu Uḷpaṭa Irumāvaraic ceyyum nen Iccaṇḍeśvarapaṭārarkku viṟṟukkoṇṭa pon [10 5]ø viṟṟu
Iccaṇḍeśvarapaṭārar Iṭaiye Innilam Irumāvaraiccaiyum 10 5ø poṉ kuṭuttukkoṇṭu Itanil pokam nicati Uḻa
kku ney non=tā viḷakku Erippataṟkku vaiytten maḻavan koṅkaṇi cenni nampiyen Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 59 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
